case_title: ALVIN B. CHAN, INC. vs. POWING, YAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POWING, YAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1424 STOCKTON ST, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522.
